steps: Seed 100,000 COS-1 cells per well ( 2 mL total volume per well) in a 6-well plate. Do not add CHX yet. Incubate the plated cells in 37 °C with 5% CO2 for 48 hours.
Dilute cycloheximide (CHX) in DMSO to a final concentration of 10 mg/mL .
Add 20 µL of 10 mg/mL, CHX (for a final concentration in the wells of 100 ug/ml, CHX ) or 20 µL, DMSO (for controls) to the 24-hour time point wells only. Note the time added.
After 08:00:00 add 20 µL of 10 mg/mL, CHX (for a final concentration of 100 ug/ml ) or 20 µL, of DMSO to the 16 hour time point wells only. Note the time added.

8 hours later, end the time course by follow Steps 7-12 in the general protocol for transfection: Transfecting COS-1 cells using FuGENE® 4K Transfection Reagent and cell lysis (M-PER) in a 6-well plate by Jailyn Izu Protocol-specific parameters: For Step 9 , add 300 µL, / well M-PER reagent + 1X protease and phosphatase inhibitor to each well

Follow Steps 2-6 in the general protocol for transfection: Transfecting COS-1 cells using FuGENE® 4K Transfection Reagent and cell lysis (M-PER) in a 6-well plate by Jailyn Izu Protocol-specific parameters: For Step 2 , use a 1:3 DNA-to-FuGENE (μg/μL) ratio, with 2 μg of total DNA for each sample. For Step 3 , use the Flag-TBK1 plasmid constructs from "Flag-TBK1 N455S and Flag-TBK1 M559R cloning" protocol and co-transfect with EGFP (OmicsLink‱ Expression Clone EX-EGFP-M11; GeneCopoeia, Inc., Rockville, MD) For Step 6 , incubate transfected cells for 24 hours 24:00:00 .
creator: Christopher Bartley
